name: l3_graceful_shutdown
description: L3: Add graceful shutdown to main.go using signal handling

turns.message:
The server in cmd/server/main.go doesn't handle graceful shutdown. Refactor it to:
1. Use http.Server instead of http.ListenAndServe
2. Listen for SIGTERM and SIGINT signals
3. On signal, call server.Shutdown with a 10-second timeout context
4. Log the shutdown process

Use signal.NotifyContext or os/signal.Notify.
